entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports for Visual Studio with .Net standard 2.0
entry.content:
Hi Joerg,

Still trying to support your legacy application...

Microsoft hasn't supported 2.0 framework since 2007
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/lifecycle/products/microsoft-net-framework

Because CR for VS also follows Microsoft end of life as Dell noted 4.6 to 4.8 is the only one supported:

Here's a link to the platforms:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

Time to let your users know they need to upgrade their OS's...

Don

I am excited about the prospect of gaining hands-on experience and deepening my knowledge through the SAP Digital Skills Initiative.

Minh

entry.title: Aggregations in DWC if all fields match
entry.content:
All, 

I have a data model with many rows for each project. I want to create an aggregation for "BillExt", if all fields match (same project/same client name/same labor code). I want to only have 1 row and SUM the "BillExt" field. Is this possible?

entry.title: Re: How to call a search help by ABAP code in dynpro module?
entry.content:
Use this FM

 

call function 'F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST'

entry.title: New Customizing to enable EWM SO/RO from S/4 delivery without Badi Implementation- S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Latest Functionality: 

SAP has delivered a standard functionality to enable determination of  RO/SO from LE shipping point by delivering a new customizing in S/4 HANA 2023 EWM. With this configuration, it is possible to enable the mapping of the LE shipping point location to the existing RO/SO field in the EWM delivery without usage of Badi /SCWM/EX_DLV_OFFICE_DET, when customer use multiple S/4 Shipping point or Goods receiving point for a single Warehouse. For customers < S/4 HANA 2023, they have to use the existing Badi mentioned in note 2595038 - The determination logic of shipping office in ODO. This functionality is very useful for the scenarios like 'One EWM warehouse Connected to Multiple Plants and it is imperative to transfer LE Shipping points and EWM ODO can incorporate it.

New customizing:

SCM Extended Warehouse Management--->Interfaces---> ERP Integration---> Delivery Processing--->Configure Mapping of Shipping Points from ERP System to EWM

Pre-Requisite:

To enable this functionality, there must be an entry for the shipping points and the receiving points in table /SAPAPO/LOCMAP for the corresponding shipping points and receiving points in the S/4 system. For this, its mandatory to create location for Shipping point via report SE38-  /SAPAPO/CREATE_LOCATIONS.

In the below example, a S/4 RO is replicated 

This report enables to create 'Location( Type 1003) from S/4 Shipping point as EWM knows Location not shipping point.

The table  /SAPAPO/LOCMAP is updated with EWM location with Suffix 'SP_4(Char S/4 SO/RO)= SP_71A1 in the above example having location type =1003

During creation of S/4 delivery with the shipping point 71A1, EWM picks the Location as GR office with SP_71A1. If the configuration is not maintained, the default determination is from SCU having attribute of RO/SO.

Logic behind the determination:

In Class /SCWM/CL_MAPIN,  a new method has been introduced 'HEADER_SHIPPING_POINT' .The new method is called within existing method CREATE_HEADER (/SCWM/CL_MAPIN) which populates the shipping point/ Goods receiving point in EWM ODO from delivery save replica FM.

Within this method it is checked whether the mapping of shipping point and shipping point location is active. If yes, the table /SAPAPO/LOCMAP is read, and the corresponding shipping point location is received and prepared to be persisted as shipping office (/RO/SO). 

Note:  With this new change, the creation of a Hierarchy /SCMB/SCUHIERMAIN - Supply Chain Unit: Hierarchy is not mandatory.

Also read my blog on same topic.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/ewm-warehouse-connected-to-multiple-shipping-points-locations/ba-p/13403475 

References:

3323758 - Receiving Point determination doesn't work

3251795 - Shipping Point sent from ERP not used as shipping office in EWM

Thanks for reading. All tests have been performed in Sandbox S/4 HANA Embedded EWM 2023 version based on my research and technical insight.

entry.title: How to delete data from setup tables of 2LIS_02_SRV?
entry.content: How to delete data from setup tables of 2LIS_02_SRV?

entry.title: Re: How to Distribute SAP Companion for Desktop Files to...
entry.content:
For on premise it is documented in the SAP Companion for Desktop Installation Guide, available from help.com. For cloud you just need to make sure the users have SAP Enable Now Launcher installed, and then call the URL of the Desktop Assistant Group (e.g. https://client.enable-now.cloud.sap/wa/{workareaid}/da/DA_XXXXXXXXXXX/.inav).

The trick is getting it to start as soon as the user starts their PC. There, you can either add it to a .bat file in the startup folder, or use Task Scheduler. Either way, something will need to be installed on everyone's PCs.

entry.title: Re: What to do if the End user is unable to view the Guid...
entry.content: Could be a lot of things, but my guess would be incorrect context - either at the application level, or more likely at the screen level. Are you neutralizing the page keys correctly? And I'm assuming you re-generated the DA (index)?

entry.title: Solution Documentation Integration with CHARM and need Transfer existing document in CHARM to SOLDOC
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are planning to Integrate the Solution documentation with CHARM. Currently we are storing the documents like (FS/TS/IMG/UAT/Test Plant) as a attachment in Request for Change and Change Document. So while doing the integration itself we are planning to copy all the existing attachments in CR and CD to the solution documentation. So kindly let us know procedure to transfer all the existing attachments in CR and CD to solution documentation in one go. 

Regards,

Jawahar Kandasamy.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solution Documentation Integration with CHARM and nee...
entry.content:
Hi Jawahar,

Generally, in CR/CD, The Solution Documentation assignment block contains references to Solution Documentation elements that are assigned to the message, change transaction, business requirement, or IT requirement. Additionally, for change documents, the changed Solution Documentation elements in the context of the present change document are displayed. See below document for reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/a7e6c5537f513b35e10000000a423f68.html

We don't have option to transfer attachments from CD/CR to solution documentation in standard scenario.

So involving consulting service team in is an option for you.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Functions Issue (By Me) Tab
entry.content:
Hi, @thecodester 
Please Try this scenarios
I think on second time changes encountered the issue.
Can't upload video. I try to explain it.

1. create flow function
2. drag and drop function created on #1 (even same area with original)
3. update original and overwrite local template (first time)
4. open flow function you put on #2 (it reflected what you put on #3)
5. update original and overwrite local template (second time)
6. open flow function you put on #2 (it not reflected now what you put on #5)

entry.content:
Hello @abel_dicka ,

Kindly ensure, either the provider system and the receiver systems are connected to the System Landscape Directory (SLD) or the BAdI MDG_IDM_GET_LCL_SYSTEM is implemented to determine the local system ID as mentioned in transaction DRFIMG.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: MRP live vs classical MRP
entry.content: Please check the note 2640393，and it provides some useful information. https://me.sap.com/notes/2640393/E

entry.title: Is any way to disable SQL Server transaction log while importing the TR
entry.content:
As we are trying to import the TR into the system my SQL Server transaction log get full and my system get down
so kindly suggest is any way we are disable my sql log while importing the TR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is any way to disable SQL Server transaction log whil...
entry.content:
You can't do without transaction logs in SQL Server, under any circumstances. 

You can set recovery model to SIMPLE for non-production environment or enable autogrow function to let transaction log file automatically increased.  

For more details for the solution of transaction log full, please go through SAP Note 421644 - SQL error 9002: Transaction log is full.

Best regards,
SAP Support

These constant i tried: \n \r\n       please help which constant i should used or is there any other way to remove the line break in payload.

entry.title: Re: DOCX content error when downloading from AL11 to local PC

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting process process Accounting entry not c...
entry.content:
Hi,

Since your SFG is standard price material, the material valuation will be based on the standard price maintained in material master, as per the normal logic. In your case, looks the SFG standard price is 500 and hence the SFG stock account postings are with the same standard price. This is standard behavior with any standard price material. If its moving average price material, the stock account will be posted with all charges (subcon service cost + value of components + any additional cost).

In addition, for subcon, you may maintain the price difference posting, so that the price difference account also will be hit in case the receipt value (subcon service cost + value of components + any additional cost) is different from the standard price of material. You may refer the config in the node: OLMB - Goods Receipt - Price Differences for Subcontract Orders at Goods Receipt. 

You may check the difference in account postings with below example:

SFG product: $400 (material value at standard price in material master)

Subcontract order:

  • Ext. service : $250
  • Components : $100

Posting schema without price differences:

Stock account SFG (BSX) : 400 +   (material standard price)
Stock change (BSV) : 400 -
GR/IR clearing acct (WRX) : 250 - (External service cost)
External service acct (FRL) : 250 +
Compon. stock account (BSX) : 100 -  (Component cost)
Consumption account (GBB) : 100 +

Posting schema with price differences:

Stock account FERT (BSX) : 400 +
Stock change (BSV) : 350 -
Price difference (PRD) :  50 -
GR/IR clearing acct (WRX) : 250 -
External service acct (FRL) : 250 +
Compon. stock account (BSX) : 100 -
Consumption account (GBB) : 100 +

Regards,

entry.title: Fiori app to compare the requested delivery dates and confirmed schedule dates
entry.content: Is there any standard Fiori app which can show the requested delivery date (which is at the header level) and the confirmed schedule line dates (item/schedule line level)?

entry.title: Incompletion log for combination of Header and Item

entry.title: Re: Seeking Advice: Python Script for Crystal Report 2013...
entry.content:
Hi Dell, 

Appreciate your detailed response.

I already created a .NET solution. But I think the Python script will be much simpler. 

The only intention of the solution will be to generate reports if reports are not getting generated as scheduled on CRS.

We have about 40 reports scheduled to get generated on the CRS. 

Sometimes, reports do not get generated. I found this in the SIA_**_CRS_trace.000001.glf -

[Error null] Server Intelligence Agent has lost its connection to the CMS cluster but will continue to attempt to reconnect. Please verify that the CMSs in your cluster are running.

I think if the Python script could restart the CRS server upon seeing that error, we should be fine.

Any advice regarding the design would be appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Sydney Stammtisch Recap 2402
entry.content:
It was a great event Mike and a great venue. It was super easy to access via circular quay train station (which has the best view of any train station in the world) and the best people to talk to. 

To me I find the name Stammtisch a bit weird in the Australian context - but that's just me.  It is alliterative with SAP and Sydney so I guess it is ok 😉

Thanks for organising. Here's to the next one.

entry.title: Deductible tax condition update in pricing procedure
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our requirement is to create a deductible condition where the tax amount should not be updated to the material price. The condition category for the condition type is set as D. However I observed that the value calculated based out of the tax code is not shown in the PO condition tab in the PO pricing procedure. How can we get the tax value updated in the PO pricing procedure and still have the condition as deductible .Also we are using S4 Hana 2022

entry.title: Re: A/P Invoice Copied From Goods Receipt PO With Landed...
entry.content:
Hi,

The item cost after Landed cost has changed. That is the reason why you cannot cancel AP invoice.

For example: 

GRPO: 1 USD per pcs

Landed cost: allocate 0.2 USD per pcs >>> now item cost: 1.2 USD

So system does not allow to cancel A/P with 1 USD. This is inconsistent.

Hope this helps,

SonTran

entry.title: Re: Procurement Workspace projects from Guided Buying
entry.content: Thank you for this. Can you confirm if a user license is required if the Procurement Project Creator is assigned to the user? They will be a project owner of the procurement workspace once PW has created in the classic UI.

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Compression of String in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, 

   I want to Compress the string value  before storing in DB table to save disk space. Currently I am using cl_abap_gzip=compress_text  & cl_abap_gzip=compress_binary to compress string, but I don't see great results . Could any one please suggest , is there any other Compression mechanism available in S/4HANA ? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Latest Goal Management - Development Goals
entry.content: We don't provide reporting capabilities for Custom Learning within Development Goals through the Learning Module, as the data for each are structured in different schemas.

How should i debug and analyse ? 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe SAP Forms service by Adobe

Can you guide me how to access the Data service class in another class

Delli

entry.title: Re: Advance Script Slow Performance in SAC for Planning D...
entry.content: Preparing to execute may also depend on the tenant sizing and resources available. You can try enabling the planning area for your model in the model preferences and see if that impacts the performance.

entry.title: How to make changed to Decisions table in SAP BPA externally
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to find  a way where the decision table feature offered inside BPA can be change externally.

Basically I am looking for an approach where I do not need to go to decision table, make changes and deploy it inside the BPA for changes to reflect.

Is there any way like any API based approach where I could add extra conditions into the rule in decision table externally?

Thanks & Regards,

Karthika

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Use of Oracle Standby database (Setup using datagurard) for System Refresh
entry.content:
We have a query on system refresh. SAP Production system is PR4 and test system is FU4. SAP version is NW 740 ERP 6. Kernel release is 753. DB release is IP_ADDRESS.

Currently SAP PR4 and FU4 database is hosted in Exadata machine RAC cluster with two active nodes. SAP PR4 has a standby database and replication is happening using Oracle Dataguard. 

DBA can clone and rename the PR4 standby database to FU4 database which then can be used for refresh of the SAP FU4? Because no restore is involved and coning can be done very quickly, this will save about 30 hrs of DB restore time. Please advise if this approach is supported by SAP. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Use of Oracle Standby database (Setup using datagurar...
entry.content:
From SAP point of view,  we only support the method described in SAP system copy guide:

System Copy for SAP Systems Based on the Application Server ABAP of SAP NetWeaver 7.3 EHP1 to 7.52 on UNIX

->6.4.3   Copying the Database Only - Refresh Database Content on Oracle Database

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting List Default Posting Dates Range
entry.content:
Hi,

You cannot have a different default date in the Inventory Posting Date from the Item Master Data. You have to manually enter the required dates.

You can check the KBA  3372510 regarding the same.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Intemediate Message Minimum age (mins) only available...

The requested behavior does not exist now, but it makes sense to get this feature after discussing it with the developers. Thanks for bringing this up.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: GETTING AN ERROR WHILE RE-USING PARTAILLY CREATED COLUMN IN SQL
entry.content:
As I said one week ago: "You can find by yourself why the query gives duplicate lines, by removing one table at a time till you get unique lines: it's the last table removed which makes the duplicate lines."

But I guess there's something you don't understand in my reply, because you keep duplicating your question (3rd time now) without asking any precision on any part of my reply...

entry.title: Re: 固定资产的年结问题
entry.content:
客户您好，

我的疑问是，是否还需要在APP-进行公司设置（旧版本）资产会计特定中执行固定资产的年结操作？

您可以根据您公司的业务需求决定是否要关闭2023年财年。如果需要，您可以按照J62 中 4.7.2部分进行操作，如果目前不需要关闭2023年财年，那么可以保持2023年财年开放，在需要关闭时再关闭。

但是，我查看J62的文档说明有年结的操作要求，这就是要执行吗？也就是说，执行完余额结转后，还要执行固定资产的年结操作，对吗？

正常情况下，我们建议客户按照J62 来操作，但是因为各个公司业务不同，所以基本上完成到余额结转并打开新的财年就可以进行下一年的业务操作。

另外，APP-进行公司设置（旧版本）资产会计特定中执行固定资产，显示是已弃用，但是新的APP-对公司代码进行设置-资产会计特定，没有相关的操作按钮，下次升级后，在哪个APP操作？

这里说的没有相关操作按钮是指什么按钮？新的APP和旧的APP 是一样的，只是从GUI APP 升级为了Fiori App。从CE2402升级开始您就可以使用新的APP。

Best Regards,

Evelyn

entry.title: How Can I Find Detailed Instructions on Setting up Prompts (@prompt())on a report using FreeHandSQL?
entry.content:
This post contains three closely-related questions.

QUESTION 1:  Can you possibly make any suggestions on where I might be able to find relatively complete information on use of @prompt() with freehandsql to make and manage prompts in WEBI reports running on SAP Business Objects Platform?

Background:  Not long ago, I was informed that adding and controlling prompts on reports using Freehandsql in Business Objects WEBI requires  manually coding in the SQL with "@prompt()" function calls.

I tried searching community.sap.com for detailed specifications and instructions for "@prompt()" function calls, but unfortunately, I did not find comprehensive information.

Question 2:  Is question 1 written making correct use of the relevant terminology?  For example, is it correct to write:  "adding and controlling prompts on reports using Freehandsql in Business Objects WEBI requires  manually coding in the SQL with "@prompt()" function calls."

Question 3:  How could I quickly find the exact information I am looking for without imposiing on anyone's time with questions in this forum?

Any information you can provide will be appreciated immensely.

Thank you.

entry.title: Order-backlog Report for Customer Projects
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a very important requirement which is a main KPI in our business process. We need to create a report which gives us the details of the order backlog report i.e Order Backlog = Planned Costs - Actual Costs. We tried using some CDS view (I_ENGMNTPROJBILLGANDRBLSCUBE) to create a custom report but we failed in fetching the details. We have a work around solution by using the apps "Project Financial Controller Overview" and "Project Briefs" but this does give the orderbacklog information directly and cannot export to excel. Also, we are looking for the same requirement for our EPPM projects as well.         I would appreciate any expert opinions on this topic or if any members of the community is tracking Orderbacklogs from their business process.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager (without ChaRM) integration with Azu...

entry.title: Re: Get dynpro field value in PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.
entry.content:
First of all, by design, search helps allow zero code and are able to source from multiple input fields at a time, provided that these screen fields are named according to DDIC structure/table and the search help is defined.

If you don't want zero code, DYNP_VALUES_READ "is working well", provided that you indicate which fields to query or parameter QUERY = 'A' to query all.

CALL FUNCTION 'DYNP_VALUES_READ'
      EXPORTING
        dyname     = dyname
        dynumb     = dynumb
        request    = 'A'       " A = read all screen fields
      TABLES
        dynpfields = dynpfields
      EXCEPTIONS
        ...

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps composer pro feature requests
entry.content:
Permission should always be asked but my issue would be with incorrect permission being requested when accessing images from a library using the pick image from library logic node. With natively deployed apps, when a user is prompted to pick an images from their gallery, the app will ask for access to their camera but won’t ask for permission to access the users image library. In my case, the app grants camera access even though it’s not part of the app’s functionality. My apologies if my phrasing wasn’t so good in the original post 

My current workaround is including a line of permission text to also access the image library within the access to camera permission request

entry.title: Re: Thai Characters Font
entry.content:
Hi,

Check KBA 1644505, if that gives some idea and then test the same on the COPY of the database to see if it works.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Iterative cost allocation with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
@Thomas_Häusel , thanks for the great example.

I am interested to know why after the first iteration, the secondary cost reduction in heating is -98688.52, Human resource is -73,750? Why heating it's not equal to -93,750 which is the sum of the first round of allocation to Heating under Production 1 + Production 2: 31,250 + 62,500. Human resource is not equal to 78,688 which is the sum of the first round of allocation to Human resource under Production 1 + Production 2: 26,229 + 52,459.  Thank you

entry.title: Re: GETTING AN ERROR WHILE RE-USING PARTAILLY CREATED COLUMN IN SQL
entry.content: No @Sandra kindly read my question once again.....it's not at all about duplicates. Actually i'hv created a partial column and when i'm reusing it in the next case statement it is throwing error like 'INVALID COLUMN'. I need to spend some time to post and it's not a simple thing no? So if it's an duplicate issue then y am i again created a new post for the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Get dynpro field value in PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.
entry.content:
Yes, the key point is to set "request = A", otherwise it will not work.

Thanks a lot for the help.

entry.title: Re: A/P Invoice Copied From Goods Receipt PO With Landed...
entry.content:
Dear Mr. @SonTran
If the AP Invoice is not based on GRPO, it can be canceled.

But if it is based on GRPO, it cannot be canceled.
So, both of them also make Item cost changes.

entry.title: Re: Where i can get or obtain the SOLMAN.XML file?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

What is the link you are referring to that talks about "solman.xml"? Would you please share the detailed info so that maybe some guys from Solution Manager team know about it.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: How to use Side Effects in RAP (Restful Application Programming) Model
entry.content:
Hi Anubhav,

Great details! 

I have a question though, when we delete the Child entity entry itself (in draft) using the standard delete action, is there a way to trigger the side effects?
in Nutshell , I delete the child entity, can Parent entity be affected with Side effects?(Before we click save).

Regards,

Pratibha.

entry.title: Re: Where i can get or obtain the SOLMAN.XML file?
entry.content: Hi Vera, we are triying to connect SAP with OnBase with "archivelink connector" and some requirements are to have a file called "solman.xml"

entry.title: Re: Where i can get or obtain the SOLMAN.XML file?
entry.content: The connector for use with the SAP ArchiveLink module can be registered with a Solution Manager application, certifying it as well as Solution Manager Ready. Before you can enable this functionality, make sure you have configured a destination Solutions Manager. For more information, see HTTP Destinations on page 60. Also, make sure you have Obtained solman.xml from your solution provider OnBase 1. Insert the Solution Manager destination sender ID as a value for the configuration SolutionManagerSenderID in the web.config file. Example: <add key="SolutionManagerSenderID" value="sapsolman"/> 2. Copy solman.xml to the ArchiveLink root directory. In some cases, you may need to change the space encoding. To convert +space encoding to %20 space encoding, the following ArchiveLink web.config setting must be set to true: <add key="UseModifiedSpaceEncoding" value="true"/> 3. Open ArchiveLink.

entry.title: Re: How to make changed to Decisions table in SAP BPA externally
entry.content: You can create the rule in a separate project and publish it. Then you can use the standard rules APIs to interact with it.

entry.title: Capitalization Report
entry.content: How can i get the list of items or PO nos are capitalized in current financial Year ? Or PO Nos or line items from PO nos are yet to capitalize ?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Scoped Roles Conversion
entry.content:
Hello,

Below sentence is true except the user who is changing the scope will not be assigned with new scope !!!! This is causing confusion and I think when we increase the scope there should be an option to select which users need this new scope . also atleast admins (some kind of special role) should have access  to self assign roles.

 

  • When a new Space (Scope) is added to a Scoped Role all users assigned to the role are becoming members of that Space.

regards

Sagar

entry.title: TO fetch the all audit report table and item type
entry.content:
how to fetch the all audit table information through the code?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: TO fetch the all audit report table and item type
entry.content:
In commerce cloud the table ydeployments table has a column AuditTableName, which inclucde all the auidit table name.

Try to use custom code to fetch the AuditTableName fromt table ydeployments

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How can we apply a Transaction Notification on HSN an...
entry.content:
Hi pressfit,

Refer to the following Object Types:

India Chapter ID (Table Name: OCHP): 140000007
India SAC Code (Table Name: OSAC): 254000014

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: GETTING AN ERROR WHILE RE-USING PARTAILLY CREATED COLUMN IN SQL
entry.content: LOL apologies!!! You have lots of issues with this query 😉

entry.title: Re: Stored procedure Notification
entry.content:
Hi,

Modify the query as per TN and check on this.

Select OPDN.DocNum , OPDN.DocDate , OPDN.CardName , OPDN.CANCELED ,
IBT1.ItemCode , IBT1.Quantity , IBT1.BatchNum
From IBT1
Inner Join PDN1 On IBT1.BaseEntry = PDN1.DocEntry
And IBT1.BaseType = PDN1.ObjType
And IBT1.BaseLinNum = PDN1.LineNum
Inner Join OPDN on PDN1.DocEntry = OPDN.DocEntry
Where OPDN.CANCELED = 'N'

Hope this helps you.

Regards

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 2
Re: GETTING AN ERROR WHILE RE-USING PARTAILLY CREATED COL...
entry.content:
You cannot reuse previous fields, you must indicate again the same formulas:

select
(select case MSEG.SHKZG when 'S' then MSEG.MENGE else 0.0 end) as Receipt,
(select case MSEG.SHKZG WHEN 'S' THEN ( MSEG.MENGE + MSEG.MENGE ) else 0.0 end) as BalQuantity,
...

NB: I didn't fix the other numerous errors of your query (like defining BalQuantity twice)

NB 2: you'd better do one simple query first, test it, then add complexity, test it again, etc.

entry.title: Re: Get dynpro field value in PROCESS ON VALUE-REQUEST.
entry.content: Not 100% correct, you have 2 solutions as I said: EITHER "you indicate which fields to query OR parameter QUERY = 'A' to query all."

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 3
